programs.title: Pre Alimiyat
programs.subtitle: Preparation Track for Advanced Studies
programs.description: A bridge program for students who want to enter the Alimiyat course, focusing on Arabic foundations, Quran recitation, and study skills.

programs.title: Tasheeh & Teaching
programs.subtitle: Correct Recitation and Teaching Skills
programs.description: A focused short-term course to correct Quran recitation and train aspiring teachers with proper methodology and lesson planning.

programs.title: Asasi Deeniyat
programs.subtitle: Essential Islamic Foundations
programs.description: An accessible course for families and working adults covering essential beliefs, worship, and daily Islamic etiquette.
